title: Midnight Tofu Stir Fry
description: A simple and savory stir fry dish made with marinated tofu, creamy sauce, and tangy flavors.

ingredients.name: Midnight oil
ingredients.notes: such as canola or grapeseed oil

instructions: Heat the midnight oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the tofu and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until golden brown.
Add the stir-fry sauce and creamy sauce and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the sesame seeds (if using) and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
